The Dungeon Master

Building worlds,
one session at a time

Being a Dungeon Master is the closest thing to being a live director, writer, actor, and referee simultaneously. Every session is improvised storytelling under pressure — and those exact skills carry into my work as a Business Analyst.

I listen deeply, adapt when plans collapse, manage multiple stakeholders, and deliver experiences people still talk about weeks later. Sound familiar?

100+ In-Person D&D Sessions
Campaigns, one-shots and events across Tamil Nadu and TTRPGCon
TTRPGCon India Organiser
ttrpgcon.in — 3 editions. Next: August 2026, Bengaluru
Game Master Team Leader
Recruited, trained and managed GMs for large-scale board game events
Gallery

TTRPGCon in pictures

Real photos from the convention floor. Click any photo to view it full screen. New games. New worlds. New friends.

TTRPGCon — The full community gathers. New games. New worlds. New friends.
Karthikeyan running a D&D 5e session at TTRPGCon, narrating the next encounter.
Custom 3D-printed battle map — the dragon's lair awaits the party.
The dungeon master's screen and miniatures set up before the adventure begins.
Players locked in concentration as the DM describes what lies ahead.
A 3D-printed dragon egg dice vault and a tower of polyhedral dice — tools of the trade.
Pre-session setup at TTRPGCon, with terrain, dice and character sheets ready.
The second edition of TTRPGCon India — a full house of adventurers.
Karthikeyan mid-session — managing combat, narrating story, keeping the table engaged.
An intense moment at the table — dice rolled, fates decided.
Every player at this table matters. Every story gets told.
"

If you can't take risks, you can't create a future. And at this table, we take risks every session.

— Karthikeyan G, Dungeon Master
